site.title: Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)
site.subtitle: An Interactive Study Companion
site.tagline: A visual, beginner-friendly walkthrough of every chapter — concepts, code, and intuition.

book.title: Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)
book.author: Sebastian Raschka

sections.title: Home
sections.desc: Start here — an interactive companion to building a GPT-style LLM from scratch.

sections.title: Understanding Large Language Models
sections.desc: What an LLM really is, the transformer that powers it, the GPT family, and the three-stage plan to build one.

sections.title: Working with Text Data
sections.desc: Turning raw text into numbers: tokenization, byte-pair encoding, sliding windows, and token + positional embeddings.

sections.title: Coding Attention Mechanisms
sections.desc: Self-attention from first principles — queries, keys, values, causal masking, dropout, and multi-head attention.

sections.title: Implementing a GPT Model from Scratch
sections.desc: Assembling the full GPT: layer normalization, GELU feed-forward, shortcut connections, transformer blocks, and text generation.

sections.title: Pretraining on Unlabeled Data
sections.desc: The training loop: cross-entropy loss, perplexity, evaluation, temperature & top-k decoding, and loading OpenAI's GPT-2 weights.

sections.title: Fine-Tuning for Classification
sections.desc: Adapting a pretrained LLM into a spam classifier: data loaders, a classification head, loss/accuracy, and supervised fine-tuning.

sections.title: Fine-Tuning to Follow Instructions
sections.desc: Instruction fine-tuning end to end: prompt formats, batching with masking, training, response extraction, and LLM-based evaluation.

sections.title: Introduction to PyTorch
sections.desc: A from-zero PyTorch primer: tensors, autograd, nn modules, data loaders, training loops, and GPU/multi-GPU training.

sections.title: References & Further Reading
sections.desc: The book's curated citations, organized by chapter, plus the best community explainers and courses.

sections.title: Exercise Solutions
sections.desc: Worked solutions to every chapter exercise, with explanations of the reasoning behind each.

sections.title: Adding Bells and Whistles to the Training Loop
sections.desc: Production-grade training upgrades: learning-rate warmup, cosine decay, and gradient clipping.

sections.title: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning with LoRA
sections.desc: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA): fine-tuning huge models by training tiny low-rank weight updates.
